# unifi_admin (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi controller admin by ID or name. Read-only.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "unifi_admin" "example" {
  name = "admin"
}

output "admin_email" {
  value = data.unifi_admin.example.email
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the admin. Use `id` or `name` to look up the admin.
- `name` (String) The name of the admin.

### Read-Only

- `device_id` (String) The device ID associated with this admin.
- `email` (String) The email address of the admin.
- `is_super_admin` (Boolean) Whether this admin is a super admin.
- `is_verified` (Boolean) Whether this admin is verified.
- `role` (String) The role of the admin.
- `time_created` (Number) Unix timestamp when the admin was created.
